name: APPlife Digital Solutions Inc
business: The Company operates primarily as an aftermarket automotive parts ecommerce business, specializing in online sales of suspension lift systems and related automotive accessories through its ecommerce platform. SAP leverages its digital presence to serve customers across the United States, offering a wide selection of products for Jeep, truck, and SUV owners.

exposures.sentence: The Company operates primarily as an aftermarket automotive parts ecommerce business, specializing in online sales of suspension lift systems and related automotive accessories through its ecommerce platform.
